release_notes: Core completion + Pro buildout: 8 Core modules, 9 Pro umbrellas (17 features), admin self-provision endpoint
changelog: Core: added UnhideColumns, DeleteHidden, SelectUsedRange, InsertTimestamp, CopyVisibleOnly

Pro umbrellas (existing) flesh-out: AdvancedData (TrimWhitespace, ExtractNumbers, ExtractText), BulkOperations (DeleteEmptyRows, DedupeSelection, FillDownBlanks), DataExport (Sheet to CSV, Selection to CSV, Copy as Markdown), SqlBuilder (Build INSERT, IN list, UPDATE)
Pro umbrellas (new): FormatPresets (Report Style), SheetProtect (Protect All / Unprotect All), SmartCompare (Highlight Duplicates), SplitColumn (Split on Comma), MergeSheets (Consolidate Sheets)
Admin: POST /api/v1/admin/self-provision endpoint for founder test accounts
Site: WiX timeout fix on fresh CI runners; tag-driven release workflow
